   368	
   369	// ===== STATE =====
   370	let votes = {}; // { id: { up: 0, down: 0, userVote: null } }
   371	let sortMode = 'votes';
   372	let searchQuery = '';
   373	let lightboxId = null;
   374	let filteredIds = [];
   375	
   376	// Init vote state for all logos
   377	LOGOS.forEach(l => { votes[l.id] = { up: 0, down: 0, userVote: null }; });
   378	
   379	// ===== VOTE HELPERS =====
   380	function getScore(id) {
   381	  const v = votes[id];
   382	  return v.up - v.down;
   383	}
   384	
   385	function getControversy(id) {
   386	  const v = votes[id];
   387	  const total = v.up + v.down;
   388	  if (total === 0) return 0;
   389	  const ratio = Math.min(v.up, v.down) / Math.max(v.up, v.down);
   390	  return total * ratio;
   391	}
   392	
   393	function castVote(id, dir) {
   394	  const v = votes[id];
   395	  if (v.userVote === dir) {
   396	    // toggle off
   397	    v[dir]--;
   398	    v.userVote = null;
   399	  } else {
   400	    if (v.userVote) { v[v.userVote]--; }
   401	    v[dir]++;
   402	    v.userVote = dir;
   403	  }
   404	  updateStats();
   405	}
   406	
   407	// ===== SORT & FILTER =====
   408	function getSortedFiltered() {
   409	  let list = LOGOS.filter(l =>
   410	    !searchQuery || l.label.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
   411	  );
   412	
   413	  if (sortMode === 'votes') {
   414	    list.sort((a, b) => {
   415	      const sd = getScore(b.id) - getScore(a.id);
   416	      if (sd !== 0) return sd;
   417	      return a.id - b.id;
   418	    });
   419	  } else if (sortMode === 'newest') {
   420	    list.sort((a, b) => b.id - a.id);
   421	  } else if (sortMode === 'controversial') {
   422	    list.sort((a, b) => getControversy(b.id) - getControversy(a.id));
   423	  }
   424	
   425	  return list;
   426	}
   427	
   428	// ===== RENDER =====
   429	function render() {
   430	  const list = getSortedFiltered();
   431	  filteredIds = list.map(l => l.id);
   432	  const grid = document.getElementById('logo-grid');
   433	  const noResults = document.getElementById('no-results');
   434	
   435	  if (list.length === 0) {
   436	    grid.innerHTML = '';
   437	    noResults.hidden = false;
   438	    return;
   439	  }
   440	  noResults.hidden = true;
   441	
   442	  // Build all cards at once for performance
   443	  const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();
   444	  list.forEach((logo, idx) => {
   445	    const existing = document.getElementById(`card-${logo.id}`);
   446	    if (existing) {
   447	      // Update in place (just score + vote state)
   448	      updateCard(logo.id);
   449	      fragment.appendChild(existing);
   450	    } else {
   451	      fragment.appendChild(createCard(logo, idx));
   452	    }
   453	  });
   454	  grid.innerHTML = '';
   455	  grid.appendChild(fragment);
   456	
   457	  // Apply rank badges
   458	  list.forEach((logo, idx) => {
   459	    const card = document.getElementById(`card-${logo.id}`);
   460	    if (!card) return;
   461	    card.classList.remove('rank-1', 'rank-2', 'rank-3');
   462	    const badge = card.querySelector('.rank-badge');
   463	    if (sortMode === 'votes') {
   464	      const score = getScore(logo.id);
   465	      if (score > 0) {
   466	        if (idx === 0) { card.classList.add('rank-1'); if (badge) badge.textContent = '🥇 #1'; }
   467	        else if (idx === 1) { card.classList.add('rank-2'); if (badge) badge.textContent = '🥈 #2'; }
   468	        else if (idx === 2) { card.classList.add('rank-3'); if (badge) badge.textContent = '🥉 #3'; }
   469	        else if (badge) badge.textContent = `#${idx + 1}`;
   470	      } else {
   471	        if (badge) badge.textContent = `#${idx + 1}`;
   472	      }
   473	    } else {
   474	      if (badge) badge.textContent = `#${idx + 1}`;
   475	    }
   476	  });
   477	}
   478	
   479	function createCard(logo, idx) {
   480	  const v = votes[logo.id];
   481	  const score = getScore(logo.id);
   482	  const card = document.createElement('article');
   483	  card.className = 'logo-card';
   484	  card.id = `card-${logo.id}`;
   485	  card.setAttribute('role', 'listitem');
   486	  card.setAttribute('aria-label', `Logo ${logo.id}: ${logo.label}`);
   487	
   488	  card.innerHTML = `
   489	    <span class="rank-badge">#${idx + 1}</span>
   490	    <div class="logo-img-wrap">
   491	      <img class="logo-img" src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opencolin/365-castle-logos/master/logos/${logo.file}" alt="${logo.label} castle logo" loading="lazy" decoding="async" />
   492	      <span class="logo-num">${String(logo.id).padStart(3,'0')}</span>
   493	    </div>
   494	    <div class="logo-body">
   495	      <p class="logo-label">${logo.label}</p>
   496	      <div class="vote-row">
   497	        <button class="vote-btn vote-up${v.userVote === 'up' ? ' voted' : ''}" data-id="${logo.id}" data-dir="up" aria-label="Upvote ${logo.label}" aria-pressed="${v.userVote === 'up'}">
   498	          <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"><path d="M12 19V5M5 12l7-7 7 7"/></svg>
   499	          ${v.up}
   500	        </button>
   501	        <span class="score${score > 0 ? ' positive' : score < 0 ? ' negative' : ''}">${score > 0 ? '+' : ''}${score}</span>
   502	        <button class="vote-btn vote-down${v.userVote === 'down' ? ' voted' : ''}" data-id="${logo.id}" data-dir="down" aria-label="Downvote ${logo.label}" aria-pressed="${v.userVote === 'down'}">
   503	          <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"><path d="M12 5v14M19 12l-7 7-7-7"/></svg>
   504	          ${v.down}
   505	        </button>
   506	      </div>
   507	    </div>
   508	  `;
   509	
   510	  // Click image to open lightbox
   511	  card.querySelector('.logo-img-wrap').addEventListener('click', (e) => {
   512	    e.stopPropagation();
   513	    openLightbox(logo.id);
   514	  });
   515	
   516	  // Vote buttons
   517	  card.querySelectorAll('.vote-btn').forEach(btn => {
   518	    btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
   519	      e.stopPropagation();
   520	      const id = parseInt(btn.dataset.id);
   521	      const dir = btn.dataset.dir;
   522	      castVote(id, dir);
   523	      btn.classList.add('pulse');
   524	      btn.addEventListener('animationend', () => btn.classList.remove('pulse'), { once: true });
   525	      updateCard(id);
   526	      updateStats();
   527	      if (sortMode === 'votes') {
   528	        // Re-sort after short delay
   529	        setTimeout(() => render(), 300);
   530	      }
   531	    });
   532	  });
   533	
   534	  return card;
   535	}
   536	
   537	function updateCard(id) {
   538	  const card = document.getElementById(`card-${id}`);
   539	  if (!card) return;
   540	  const v = votes[id];
   541	  const score = getScore(id);
   542	
   543	  const upBtn = card.querySelector('.vote-up');
   544	  const downBtn = card.querySelector('.vote-down');
   545	  const scoreEl = card.querySelector('.score');
   546	
   547	  if (upBtn) {
   548	    upBtn.classList.toggle('voted', v.userVote === 'up');
   549	    upBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', v.userVote === 'up');
   550	    upBtn.innerHTML = `<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"><path d="M12 19V5M5 12l7-7 7 7"/></svg>${v.up}`;
   551	  }
   552	  if (downBtn) {
   553	    downBtn.classList.toggle('voted', v.userVote === 'down');
   554	    downBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', v.userVote === 'down');
   555	    downBtn.innerHTML = `<svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3"><path d="M12 5v14M19 12l-7 7-7-7"/></svg>${v.down}`;
   556	  }
   557	  if (scoreEl) {
   558	    scoreEl.textContent = (score > 0 ? '+' : '') + score;
   559	    scoreEl.className = 'score' + (score > 0 ? ' positive' : score < 0 ? ' negative' : '');
   560	  }
   561	}
   562	
   563	// ===== STATS =====
   564	function updateStats() {
   565	  const totalVotes = Object.values(votes).reduce((s, v) => s + v.up + v.down, 0);
   566	  const votedCount = Object.values(votes).filter(v => v.userVote).length;
   567	
   568	  document.getElementById('stat-votes').textContent = totalVotes;
   569	  document.getElementById('stat-voted').textContent = votedCount;
   570	
   571	  // Leader
   572	  const topScore = Math.max(...LOGOS.map(l => getScore(l.id)));
   573	  if (topScore > 0) {
   574	    const leader = LOGOS.find(l => getScore(l.id) === topScore);
   575	    if (leader) document.getElementById('stat-leader').textContent = `#${leader.id} ${leader.label}`;
   576	  } else {
   577	    document.getElementById('stat-leader').textContent = '—';
   578	  }
   579	}
   580	
   581	// ===== LIGHTBOX =====
   582	function openLightbox(id) {
   583	  lightboxId = id;
   584	  const logo = LOGOS.find(l => l.id === id);
   585	  if (!logo) return;
   586	
   587	  document.getElementById('lightbox').hidden = false;
   588	  document.getElementById('lightbox-backdrop').classList.add('open');
   589	  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
   590	
   591	  updateLightbox();
   592	  document.getElementById('lightbox').focus();
   593	}
   594	
   595	function updateLightbox() {
   596	  if (!lightboxId) return;
   597	  const logo = LOGOS.find(l => l.id === lightboxId);
   598	  if (!logo) return;
   599	  const v = votes[logo.id];
   600	  const score = getScore(logo.id);
   601	
   602	  document.getElementById('lightbox-img').src = `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opencolin/365-castle-logos/master/logos/${logo.file}`;
   603	  document.getElementById('lightbox-img').alt = `${logo.label} castle logo`;
   604	  document.getElementById('lightbox-num').textContent = `#${String(logo.id).padStart(3,'0')} of 365`;
   605	  document.getElementById('lightbox-title').textContent = logo.label;
   606	
   607	  const upBtn = document.getElementById('lb-upvote');
   608	  const downBtn = document.getElementById('lb-downvote');
   609	  const scoreEl = document.getElementById('lb-score');
   610	
   611	  upBtn.className = 'vote-btn vote-up large' + (v.userVote === 'up' ? ' voted' : '');
   612	  upBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', v.userVote === 'up');
   613	  document.getElementById('lb-up-count').textContent = v.up;
   614	
   615	  downBtn.className = 'vote-btn vote-down large' + (v.userVote === 'down' ? ' voted' : '');
   616	  downBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', v.userVote === 'down');
   617	  document.getElementById('lb-down-count').textContent = v.down;
   618	
   619	  scoreEl.textContent = (score > 0 ? '+' : '') + score;
   620	  scoreEl.className = 'score-display' + (score > 0 ? ' positive' : score < 0 ? ' negative' : '');
   621	
   622	  // Nav buttons
   623	  const pos = filteredIds.indexOf(lightboxId);
   624	  document.getElementById('lb-prev').disabled = pos <= 0;
   625	  document.getElementById('lb-next').disabled = pos >= filteredIds.length - 1;
   626	}
   627	
   628	function closeLightbox() {
   629	  lightboxId = null;
   630	  document.getElementById('lightbox').hidden = true;
   631	  document.getElementById('lightbox-backdrop').classList.remove('open');
   632	  document.body.style.overflow = '';
   633	}
   634	
   635	// ===== EVENT LISTENERS =====
   636	
   637	// Sort tabs
   638	document.querySelectorAll('.sort-tab').forEach(tab => {
   639	  tab.addEventListener('click', () => {
   640	    document.querySelectorAll('.sort-tab').forEach(t => {
   641	      t.classList.remove('active');
   642	      t.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false');
   643	    });
   644	    tab.classList.add('active');
   645	    tab.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'true');
   646	    sortMode = tab.dataset.sort;
   647	    render();
   648	  });
   649	});
   650	
   651	// Search
   652	document.querySelector('.search-input').addEventListener('input', (e) => {
   653	  searchQuery = e.target.value;
   654	  render();
   655	});
   656	
   657	// Dark mode toggle
   658	(function () {
   659	  const t = document.querySelector('[data-theme-toggle]');
   660	  const r = document.documentElement;
   661	  let d = matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light';
   662	  r.setAttribute('data-theme', d);
   663	  t.innerHTML = d === 'dark'
   664	    ? '<svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="5"/><path d="M12 1v2M12 21v2M4.22 4.22l1.42 1.42M18.36 18.36l1.42 1.42M1 12h2M21 12h2M4.22 19.78l1.42-1.42M18.36 5.64l1.42-1.42"/></svg>'
   665	    : '<svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/></svg>';
   666	  t.addEventListener('click', () => {
   667	    d = d === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
   668	    r.setAttribute('data-theme', d);
   669	    t.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Switch to ' + (d === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark') + ' mode');
   670	    t.innerHTML = d === 'dark'
   671	      ? '<svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="5"/><path d="M12 1v2M12 21v2M4.22 4.22l1.42 1.42M18.36 18.36l1.42 1.42M1 12h2M21 12h2M4.22 19.78l1.42-1.42M18.36 5.64l1.42-1.42"/></svg>'
   672	      : '<svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/></svg>';
   673	  });
   674	})();
   675	
   676	// Lightbox controls
   677	document.getElementById('lightbox-close').addEventListener('click', closeLightbox);
   678	document.getElementById('lightbox-backdrop').addEventListener('click', closeLightbox);
   679	
   680	document.getElementById('lb-upvote').addEventListener('click', () => {
   681	  if (!lightboxId) return;
   682	  castVote(lightboxId, 'up');
   683	  updateCard(lightboxId);
   684	  updateLightbox();
   685	  if (sortMode === 'votes') setTimeout(() => render(), 300);
   686	});
   687	
   688	document.getElementById('lb-downvote').addEventListener('click', () => {
   689	  if (!lightboxId) return;
   690	  castVote(lightboxId, 'down');
   691	  updateCard(lightboxId);
   692	  updateLightbox();
   693	  if (sortMode === 'votes') setTimeout(() => render(), 300);
   694	});
   695	
   696	document.getElementById('lb-prev').addEventListener('click', () => {
   697	  const pos = filteredIds.indexOf(lightboxId);
   698	  if (pos > 0) { lightboxId = filteredIds[pos - 1]; updateLightbox(); }
   699	});
   700	
   701	document.getElementById('lb-next').addEventListener('click', () => {
   702	  const pos = filteredIds.indexOf(lightboxId);
   703	  if (pos < filteredIds.length - 1) { lightboxId = filteredIds[pos + 1]; updateLightbox(); }
   704	});
   705	
   706	// Keyboard navigation
   707	document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
   708	  if (lightboxId !== null) {
   709	    if (e.key === 'Escape') { closeLightbox(); return; }
   710	    if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
   711	      const pos = filteredIds.indexOf(lightboxId);
   712	      if (pos > 0) { lightboxId = filteredIds[pos - 1]; updateLightbox(); }
   713	      return;
   714	    }
   715	    if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
   716	      const pos = filteredIds.indexOf(lightboxId);
   717	      if (pos < filteredIds.length - 1) { lightboxId = filteredIds[pos + 1]; updateLightbox(); }
   718	      return;
   719	    }
   720	    if (e.key === 'u' || e.key === 'U') {
   721	      castVote(lightboxId, 'up');
   722	      updateCard(lightboxId);
   723	      updateLightbox();
   724	    }
   725	    if (e.key === 'd' || e.key === 'D') {
   726	      castVote(lightboxId, 'down');
   727	      updateCard(lightboxId);
   728	      updateLightbox();
   729	    }
   730	  }
   731	});
   732	
   733	// ===== INITIAL RENDER =====
   734	render();
   735	updateStats();
   736
